perFrameCode: qdev = 0; i =0; loop (num_res, qdev += pow(megabuf(i+3)-qavg,2); i += 8; );
n = 2000; m = 4000+step; k=0; slope = 0.01; speed = 0.4/slope; size = 0;
m = m + step; n = n+8; k= k+1;
trelx += BPM/120/q20*run*dt* (1-0.5*slow) * r3 + ndir*movarg*run; //ungef. Bew. Korr
perFrameInitCode: slow = 1; r1=8; r2=1; run = 0; bvol_=0; dir = 1; tlen=2.5; ndir = 1; size_=1; vol_=1; certain = 1; movarg = rand(100);
lc = rand(2)-1; tr1 = rand(5); tr2 = rand(5); r5 = rand(6); r9 = rand(1); vc_=rand(10); r3=2; tubes = pow(2,1+int(rand(3)));
